meaning: 帕劳群岛[西太平洋](即帛琉群岛)
examples: Palau also established the world's first shark sanctuary in 2009.
The Pacific island nation of Palau has become home to the sixth largest marine sanctuary in the world.
Creating this sanctuary is a bold move that the people of Palau recognize as essential to our survival.
Other island nations with sanctuaries also include Palau, the Maldives, Tokelau, Honduras and the Bahamas.
Can Palau envision Tecate one day advertising on baseball games on Fox or ESPN?
